content: NUST Bank has recently launched the 'NUST SmartWallet', a digital wallet integrated directly into the mobile banking app. The maximum daily transaction limit for the SmartWallet is PKR 50,000.
To activate the NUST SmartWallet, users must navigate to the 'Digital Services' tab in the app, select 'SmartWallet', and verify their identity using a one-time biometric scan.

A special promotion is running until December 2026: any NUST Bank customer who pays their university tuition fee using the NUST SmartWallet will receive a 5% cashback directly into their wallet balance.

If a user forgets their NUST SmartWallet PIN, they cannot reset it through the app. They must call the NUST Bank helpline at +92 (51) 111 000 494 and speak to a representative to request a PIN reset link.
